maps.title: MAP: Risk Management Compliance Control
maps.objective: To ensure that all applicable Risk Management requirements relating to 'Governance Obligation Compliance', thereby enabling Bank to demonstrate full regulatory adherence and reduce Compliance Risk exposure.

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Risk Management Compliance Control
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Risk Management Compliance Control'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes: Review control description:

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Risk Management Compliance Control
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Risk Management Compliance Control
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Risk Management Compliance Control'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Risk Management Compliance Control
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Risk Management Compliance Control' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Risk Management Compliance Con
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Risk Management Compliance Control'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

maps.title: MAP: Digital Payments Compliance Control
maps.objective: To ensure that all applicable Digital Payments requirements relating to 'Prudential Norm Compliance', thereby enabling the institution to demonstrate full regulatory adherence and reduce Operational Risk exposure.

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Digital Payments Compliance Control
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Digital Payments Compliance Control'. Document the existing System Control posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes: Review control description:

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Digital Payments Compliance Control
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement technical controls to configure system to. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Configure system parameters: Digital Payments Compliance Control
tasks.description: Apply specific configuration parameters for 'Digital Payments Compliance Control'. Refer to applicable vendor documentation or Group Policy / Registry / OS settings for the exact parameter names and values required. Validate changes do not conflict with existing business configurations. Document pre-change and post-change configuration states.
tasks.expected_evidence: PowerShell output, Registry export, or system configuration dump
tasks.implementation_notes: Ensure rollback script is prepared prior to making changes.

tasks.title: Test and validate implementation: Digital Payments Compliance Control
tasks.description: Execute functional and compliance testing to confirm that 'Digital Payments Compliance Control' has been implemented correctly. Tests must cover positive scenarios (compliant behaviour is accepted) and negative scenarios (non-compliant behaviour is rejected). Record all test cases, inputs, outputs, and pass/fail results in a Test Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Test report PDF with test case results and system output evidence
tasks.implementation_notes: All tests must pass before proceeding to the next task.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Digital Payments Compliance Control
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Digital Payments Compliance Control'. Required evidence types: System Configuration Screenshot. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: System Configuration Screenshot
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Digital Payments Compliance Control
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Digital Payments Compliance Control' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Configuration Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Digital Payments Compliance Co
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Digital Payments Compliance Control'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
